title: AQUALONA® Premium Thermoplastic Toilet Seat - Soft Close - Hardwearing Seat with One Button Hinge Release - Oval Shaped - Click, Lift & Clean Technology - Top and Bottom Fittings (Grey)
features: THERMOPLASTIC TOILET SEAT- The Aqualona Thermoplastic Toilet Seat is durable and designed to complement your bathroom. The hard-wearing plastic seat is virtually unbreakable, fade-resistant, hygienic, easy to wipe down and has a smooth appearance.

SOFT AND SLOW CLOSE - The Thermoplastic Toilet Seat features rust-resistant soft close hinges to stop loud slamming noise while the slow-close endurance saves time and minimises wear and tear. Each Aqualona toilet seat is anti-fatigue stress tested 50000 times for repeated open and close use

OVAL SHAPE DESIGN - The Thermoplastic seat is made has an oval design to perfectly fit almost any oval toilet. Durable rust-proof stainless steel hinges ensure the perfect fit and provide support for up to 150kg

EASY INSTALLATION - Easily fit the plastic toilet seat! This seat features 360-degree adjustable rotation hinges on top and bottom, plus rubber based with tight-grip plastic locking plugs to keep the seat firmly in place. A quick hinge release ensures that the seat is easily detached for easy cleaning
TOP AND BOTTOM FIXING - Compatible with toilets that have holes for fixing on the top or underneath

STAINLESS STEEL CAPS - For covering the fixings, attractive and easy to clean. These stainless steel caps certainly add a touch of quality and style to the overall look of the seat, whether open or closed
description: Product Description Soft Close Our soft close hinges ensure the seat closes slowly and quietly. Preventing loud bangs and minimising disruption. Quick Release & Easy Clean Simply click, lift and clean. It's that simple! Easy Installation Clear and simple fitting instructions included with every toilet seat. 360° Degrees Hinges 360° hinges makes installing even simpler. Simply adjust the hinges to allow your new toilet seat to sit perfectly on your toilet pan. Oval Shape Toilet Seat Before purchasing your new toilet seat, check the shape of your toilet seat to ensure it will fit with your toilet pan. Oval Toilet Pan This oval toilet seat is suitable for an oval toilet pan. Made from Thermoplastic Made from hard-wearing, durable thermoplastic. Modern Finish This modern toilet seat will look great in any bathroom.
title: Coldcool Moistened Lens Cleaning Wipes - Individually Wrapped, Quick-Dry & Scratch-Free Cleaning Cloths for Glasses - Safe for Tech Enthusiasts, Office Workers & Outdoor Use
features: Premium Lens Wipes: Provides quick cleaning. Perfect for cleaning and removing fingerprints from glass or plastic lenses, as well as screens and digital displays
Quick-Dry & Streak-Free Formula: Engineered with a fast-evaporating solution that leaves zero residue, ensuring crystal-clear visibility without smudges or streaks on lenses and screens.
Scratch-Free & Gentle Protection: Ultra-soft, non-abrasive material safely removes dust, fingerprints, and grease while protecting sensitive coatings on anti-glare glasses or OLED displays.
Portable & Hygienic Design: Individually wrapped lens cleaning wipes fit in pockets, bags, or desk drawers—perfect for on-the-go professionals, gamers, photographers, or outdoor adventures.

Trusted for Daily Use: Coldcool’s hypoallergenic wipes are alcohol-free and safe for frequent use by eyeglass wearers, office workers, and electronics owners seeking reliable, scratch-free maintenance.
description: Product Description Premium Lens Wipes: Provides quick cleaning. Perfect for cleaning and removing fingerprints from glass or plastic lenses, as well as screens and digital displays, Non scratch, effective and thorough, with a fast drying formula which leaves a streak free finish. Pocket sized cloths individually wrapped, ideal for everyday use Safe for all lenses: Including optical and polarised lenses. Ideal for spectacles, reading glasses, sports masks, fashion eyewear, cycling shades, camera lenses, helmets, sunglasses, ski goggles and more
